TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Corey Allen kawas tay 1934, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 6, Corey Allen, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2010) Corey Allen htagan beh sa Cleveland, Ohio. hiya ga yaya yaba Carl ru Fran Cohen. raral ga, Allen mqwas beh cyalifuniya , luosanci krahu' pqwasan biru. aring mqwas ru myugi mtzyaw nya. 1954 kwas hiya magal blaq balay biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ¶~ ®orej allen kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, ¶~ ®orej allen, s~…ïquliq na Œ≤u≈ãe î. (wal mƒßuqil s~…ïa kawas~…ï taj ****) ¶~ ®orej allen ƒßta…£an Œ≤eƒß s~…ïa ¶~ ®le*elan*, oƒßio. ƒßija …£a jaja jaŒ≤a ¶~ ®arl ru *ran ¶~ ®oƒßen. raral …£a, allen mqwas~…ï Œ≤eƒß ¶~ ®jali*unija , luos~…ïan ¶~ ®i kraƒßu î pqwas~…ïan Œ≤iru. ari≈ã mqwas~…ï ru mju…£i mtzjaw nja. **** kwas~…ï ƒßija ma…£al Œ≤laq Œ≤alaj Œ≤iru. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ï
S.FORM: Corey Allen kawas tay 1934, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 6, Corey Allen, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2010) Corey Allen htagan beh sa Cleveland, Ohio. hiya ga yaya yaba Carl ru Fran Cohen. raral ga, Allen mqwas beh cyalifuniya , luosanci krahu' pqwasan biru. aring mqwas ru myugi mtzyaw nya. 1954 kwas hiya magal blaq balay biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
